title: Kalshi in early IPO talks with investment banks: Report

title: Emerging Currencies Retrace Losses on Hopes of Lebanon Truce
summary: A gauge of emerging-market currencies trimmed losses following a report that Israel and Hezbollah have agreed to a ceasefire in Lebanon.

title: Stocks Slide as Iran Nuclear Talks Hit Early Snag: Markets Wrap
summary: Global stocks are ending a strong week on a cautious note as relief over an interim peace deal between the US and Iran gave way to a focus on the challenges of securing a lasting agreement.

title: Texas Brothers Plead Guilty to $8M Armed Crypto Kidnapping
summary: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

title: Franklin Templeton Files for ETFs That Funnel Stock Dividends Into Bitcoin
